title: FLOSS Weekly 296: Bro
summary:
Bro is a powerful network analysis framework that is much different from the typical IDS you may know.
As one of the lead engineers, Seth Hall works on the design, development and implementation of the Bro Programming Language and the Bro Platform.
As the lead trainer and community coordinator Liam has worked with a large number of organizations to apply the new capabilities of the Bro Platform in novel and unexpected ways.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future. Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
